clusters.title: SpaceX's public offering creates new millionaires: "I don't have the words, honestly"
clusters.neutral_headline: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
bullet_summary: The Justice Department closed its investigation into the proposed $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Brothers Discovery, saying it found no threat to competition or consumers
Reported by CBS News, NPR News, BBC Top Stories and others

items.title: SpaceX's public offering creates new millionaires: "I don't have the words, honestly"
items.standfirst: SpaceX's market debut made Elon Musk a trillionaire on Friday. The company has also minted thousands of new millionaires. Jo Ling Kent reports.
items.content: SpaceX's market debut made Elon Musk a trillionaire on Friday. The company has also minted thousands of new millionaires. Jo Ling Kent reports.

items.title: DOJ paves way for Paramount Skydance to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
items.standfirst: Paramount Skydance's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery would not harm U.S. consumers or weaken competition, DOJ antitrust enforcers said.
items.content: Paramount Skydance's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery would not harm U.S. consumers or weaken competition, DOJ antitrust enforcers said.

items.title: Paramount-Warner Brothers merger gets Justice Department approval
items.standfirst: The Justice Department closed its investigation into the proposed $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Brothers Discovery, saying it found no threat to competition or consumers.
items.content: The Justice Department closed its investigation into the proposed $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Brothers Discovery, saying it found no threat to competition or consumers.

items.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved by US Justice Department
items.standfirst: The approval marks a key development in the merger that will reshape media, allowing the continue of the takeover of the Hollywood studio, which owns CNN and HBO.
items.content: The approval marks a key development in the merger that will reshape media, allowing the continue of the takeover of the Hollywood studio, which owns CNN and HBO.

items.title: Justice Dept. approves Paramount's acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery
items.standfirst: The decision paves the way for a proposed $111 billion merger uniting two rival studio giants — Paramount, owner of CBS, and the much larger Warner, which includes HBO and CNN.
items.content: The decision paves the way for a proposed $111 billion merger uniting two rival studio giants — Paramount, owner of CBS, and the much larger Warner, which includes HBO and CNN. (Image credit: Nick Ut)

items.title: Details on SpaceX debut and DOJ approving Paramount merger with Warner
items.standfirst: SpaceX officially went public on Friday, making history as the largest initial public offering of all time and making Elon Musk a trillionaire. Also on Friday, the Justice Department gave the green light for a merger between CBS News' parent company, Paramount Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery. Jo Ling Kent has more.
items.content: SpaceX officially went public on Friday, making history as the largest initial public offering of all time and making Elon Musk a trillionaire. Also on Friday, the Justice Department gave the green light for a merger between CBS News' parent company, Paramount Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery. Jo Ling Kent has more.

items.title: US justice department approves $111bn merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery
items.standfirst: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...
items.content: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...

items.title: Justice Department approves Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
items.standfirst: The Justice Department has given the merger between CBS News' parent company, Paramount Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery the green light. CBS News MoneyWatch correspondent Kelly O'Grady has the latest.
items.content: The Justice Department has given the merger between CBS News' parent company, Paramount Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery the green light. CBS News MoneyWatch correspondent Kelly O'Grady has the latest.

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.standfirst: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.
items.content: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

items.title: SpaceX stock closes up 19% on first day of trading
items.standfirst: SpaceX launched onto Wall Street on Friday with the largest initial public offering in history. CBS News MoneyWatch correspondent Kelly O'Grady has the details.
items.content: SpaceX launched onto Wall Street on Friday with the largest initial public offering in history. CBS News MoneyWatch correspondent Kelly O'Grady has the details.

items.title: SpaceX’s surge on debut makes Musk world’s first trillionaire
items.standfirst: Rocket and AI group’s shares jumped by nearly a fifth after raising $75bn in record initial public offering
items.content: Rocket and AI group’s shares jumped by nearly a fifth after raising $75bn in record initial public offering

items.title: Paramount’s Deal for Warner Bros. Is Cleared by US DOJ
items.standfirst: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.
items.content: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.

items.title: SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge, Merz Says
items.standfirst: Tesla investor Alexandra Merz says Tesla and SpaceX will merge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: Tesla investor Alexandra Merz says Tesla and SpaceX will merge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
items.standfirst: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
items.content: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq

items.title: Elon Musk Is the World’s First Trillionaire
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.
items.content: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.

items.title: SpaceX Shares Surge After IPO Makes Musk a Trillionaire
items.standfirst: After months of waiting, SpaceX is now a public company. The stock climbed 31% above its offering price at at one point on the Nasdaq. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand was there for opening bell and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: After months of waiting, SpaceX is now a public company. The stock climbed 31% above its offering price at at one point on the Nasdaq. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand was there for opening bell and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX Makes History With Biggest-Ever IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/12/2026
items.standfirst: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down SpaceX's big debut in the public markets as shares start trading on the Nasdaq. They are joined by 137 Ventures Partner Christian Garrett, Pegasus Tech Ventures Founder Anis Uzzaman, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, and Tesla retail investor Alexandra Merz to discuss what it means for investors, the space economy, and the AI IPO pipeline. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down SpaceX's big debut in the public markets as shares start trading on the Nasdaq. They are joined by 137 Ventures Partner Christian Garrett, Pegasus Tech Ventures Founder Anis Uzzaman, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, and Tesla retail investor Alexandra Merz to discuss what it means for investors, the space economy, and the AI IPO pipeline. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Elon Musk Is the World's First Trillionaire
items.standfirst: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX Begins Trading on the Nasdaq After Record IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Space Stocks Tumble as Investors Race Toward Musk’s IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.
items.content: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.

items.title: Elon Musk Talks SpaceX, Future, and History on IPO Day
items.standfirst: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday, with a livestream event where he addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday, with a livestream event where he addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Elon Musk Rings Nasdaq Opening Bell Before SpaceX Begins Trading
items.standfirst: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday morning before his company began trading. The rocket company made history with a $75 billion IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday morning before his company began trading. The rocket company made history with a $75 billion IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX IPO makes history as largest ever. Stock gains 19% on first day
items.standfirst: The initial public offering from the rocket and AI company raised some $75 billion, making the company one of the biggest in the world — and likely making Elon Musk a trillionaire.
items.content: The initial public offering from the rocket and AI company raised some $75 billion, making the company one of the biggest in the world — and likely making Elon Musk a trillionaire.(Image credit: RONALDO SCHEMIDT)

items.title: What Stock Traders Can Expect From SpaceX’s Trading Debut
items.standfirst: Investors will soon have a sense of how SpaceX shares will perform after the largest initial public offering ever — but they may need to wait several hours to get in on the trading action.
items.content: Investors will soon have a sense of how SpaceX shares will perform after the largest initial public offering ever — but they may need to wait several hours to get in on the trading action.

items.title: UK Retail Investors Place $1 Billion of Orders in SpaceX IPO
items.standfirst: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.
items.content: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

items.title: SpaceX Shares Close 19% Higher After Historic $75 Billion IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.
items.content: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.

items.title: Thailand’s Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies aged 47 after years in a coma
items.standfirst: Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol’s health had worsened since she was hospitalised in December 2022 with heart problems that left her gravely illThe eldest child of Thailand’s King Maha Vajiralongkorn has died aged 47, the palace has said, after nearly four years in a coma.Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, known in Thailand as Princess Bha, had been in hospital since December 2022 when she became gravely ill after having heart problems while out training her dogs. Continue reading...

clusters.title: At least 1 killed, 9 hospitalized in Texas mass shooting; suspect dead
clusters.neutral_headline: At least one killed and nine hospitalised in Midland, Texas shooting
bullet_summary: The suspect, Victor Mata Villarreal, was wanted for attempted murder of a police officer after shooting at law enforcement during a vehicle chase earlier this week, officials said
The gunman was found dead on Friday, with the FBI and state agencies investigating
Authorities in Midland, Texas, say that suspected attacker confirmed dead after shooting and standoff with police

items.title: At least 1 killed, 9 hospitalized in Texas mass shooting; suspect dead

items.content: The suspect, Victor Mata Villarreal, was wanted for attempted murder of a police officer after shooting at law enforcement during a vehicle chase earlier this week, officials said.

items.title: Texas shooting kills at least 1, injures 10
items.standfirst: On Wednesday, a 45-year-old gunman opened fire on police in Midland, Texas, allegedly refusing to surrender to police. He fled, finally barricading himself in an abandoned veterinary building and shooting wildly. All of those shot were civilians. The gunman was found dead on Friday, with the FBI and state agencies investigating. Jason Allen has more.
items.content: On Wednesday, a 45-year-old gunman opened fire on police in Midland, Texas, allegedly refusing to surrender to police. He fled, finally barricading himself in an abandoned veterinary building and shooting wildly. All of those shot were civilians. The gunman was found dead on Friday, with the FBI and state agencies investigating. Jason Allen has more.

items.title: Police had been searching for Midland, Texas, gunman in days leading up to shooting
items.standfirst: At least one person is dead, and 10 others are injured after a gunman opened fire in Midland, Texas, on Friday. The shooter died after a standoff with police. CBS News correspondent Jason Allen reports.
items.content: At least one person is dead, and 10 others are injured after a gunman opened fire in Midland, Texas, on Friday. The shooter died after a standoff with police. CBS News correspondent Jason Allen reports.

Reported by Al Jazeera, France24

items.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
items.standfirst: Progress for Kyiv's membership bid given the green light after Hungary's new government lifts Budapest's veto.
items.content: Progress for Kyiv's membership bid given the green light after Hungary's new government lifts Budapest's veto.

items.title: Ukraine's EU accession bid gains traction as Hungary lifts veto
items.standfirst: The European Union will resume membership negotiations with Ukraine on Monday after Hungary's new government lifted a long-standing veto imposed by former prime minister Viktor Orban. EU leaders said all member states had agreed to open the first phase of accession talks with Ukraine and Moldova, marking a fresh show of support for Kyiv amid Russia's ongoing war.
items.content: The European Union will resume membership negotiations with Ukraine on Monday after Hungary's new government lifted a long-standing veto imposed by former prime minister Viktor Orban. EU leaders said all member states had agreed to open the first phase of accession talks with Ukraine and Moldova, marking a fresh show of support for Kyiv amid Russia's ongoing war.
